eventName: Building Production RAG Pipelines — Deep Dive
description: An intensive deep-dive into production RAG pipelines. Longer talk slots, advanced content, live coding, and minimal breaks. For developers who want to go beyond the basics and understand the engineering decisions behind real RAG systems.
targetAudience: Intermediate to advanced Python developers with LLM API experience

suggestedSpeakers.name: Sarah Chen
suggestedSpeakers.reason: Deep RAG expertise with 12 talks and a production blog. Can handle extended live-coding sessions and advanced Q&A.

suggestedSpeakers.name: Priya Patel
suggestedSpeakers.reason: AI Research Scientist with deep technical knowledge. Can cover evaluation metrics, fine-tuning retrievers, and advanced optimization — content most speakers can't deliver.

suggestedVenue.name: Downtown Tech Hub
suggestedVenue.reason: Recording equipment for capturing the dense content. Capacity 80 gives breathing room. Mic system helps for live-coding narration.

slots.title: Live Coding: Production Pipeline from Scratch
slots.speaker: sarah-chen

slots.title: Advanced Retrieval: Reranking, Hybrid Search, and Fine-Tuned Embeddings
slots.speaker: priya-patel
